name: Teleflow
description: Teleflow — AI-powered telephony automation platform for building IVR and voice workflow agents.

seo.title: Teleflow — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Teleflow: Teleflow — AI-powered telephony automation platform for building IVR and voice workflow agents.

when_to_use: Orchestrating multi-channel notification workflows via API
Building in-app, email, SMS, and push notification pipelines
Managing notification preferences and delivery logic centrally
Running notification infrastructure without custom routing code

pros: Focused on IVR and voice workflows
review.verdict: Does the job for basic IVR modernization but brings nothing clearly unique versus louder competitors.
review.best_for: Mid-market ops teams replacing legacy IVR with AI-driven voice flows
review.not_for: Teams evaluating best-in-class voice AI — Synthflow, Vocode, LiveKit likely win
